cells.title: Overview
cells.source: This browser notebook adapts the BMW vignette into executable model, run, and chart cells. It focuses on a Newton baseline and two scenario comparisons.

cells.title: BMW balance sheet
cells.description: Balance-sheet matrix for the BMW model, following the sfcr article presentation.
cells.note: Source structure adapted from the sfcr BMW article balance-sheet display.

cells.title: BMW transactions-flow matrix
cells.description: Transactions-flow matrix for the BMW model, shown in the same accounting style as the sfcr article.
cells.note: Signs and row structure follow the BMW transactions-flow matrix in the sfcr article.

cells.title: BMW transaction flow sequence
cells.description: Canvas-rendered sequence view generated from the transactions-flow matrix at the selected simulation period.
cells.note: Use Reset and Next step to manually reveal flows in order.

cells.title: BMW equation dependency graph
cells.description: Dependency view of the BMW equations organized by sector strips and accounting bands.
cells.note: Use this alongside the transaction-flow sequence to compare accounting flows with equation structure.
